parameters.query:
SELECT
  a.id                     AS audit_id,
  a.opportunity_id,
  a.observations,
  a.strengths,
  a.gaps,
  o.client_id,
  c.type                   AS client_type,
  org.name                 AS organization_name,
  org.industry,
  p.job_title,
  p.first_name,
  p.last_name,
  pt.manager_needs,
  pt.communication_situations,
  (SELECT payload -> 'hypothesis_recommendation' FROM appdata.extractions ex
     JOIN appdata.transcripts t ON t.id = ex.transcript_id
     JOIN appdata.discovery_calls dc ON dc.id = t.discovery_call_id
     WHERE dc.opportunity_id = a.opportunity_id AND ex.accepted_at IS NOT NULL
     ORDER BY ex.created_at DESC LIMIT 1)      AS hypothesis_recommendation,
  (SELECT jsonb_object_agg(s.dimension, s.cefr_level || '.' || (s.cefr_decimal * 10)::int)
     FROM appdata.audit_scores s WHERE s.audit_id = a.id)   AS cefr_scores
FROM appdata.audits a
JOIN appdata.opportunities o        ON o.id = a.opportunity_id
JOIN appdata.clients c              ON c.id = o.client_id
LEFT JOIN appdata.organizations org ON org.id = c.organization_id
LEFT JOIN appdata.people p          ON p.id = c.primary_contact_id
LEFT JOIN appdata.participants pt   ON pt.id = a.participant_id
WHERE a.id = $1::bigint;

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'anthropic/claude-sonnet-4.5', temperature: 0.3, response_format: { type: 'json_object' }, messages: [ { role: 'system', content: 'Jestes asystentem metodyka CoAction. Na podstawie wynikow audytu jezykowego zwroc WYLACZNIE jeden obiekt JSON (bez markdown) o kluczach: headline (string, krotki naglowek rekomendacji), situation_description (string, 2-4 zdania opisujace obecna sytuacje komunikacyjna uczestnika), rationale (string, uzasadnienie wyboru produktu), goals (tablica 2-4 obiektow z kluczami title, body, stage_label).' }, { role: 'user', content: 'Klient: ' + ($json.client_type || '') + ', organizacja ' + ($json.organization_name || 'brak danych') + ', branza ' + ($json.industry || 'brak danych') + ', stanowisko ' + ($json.job_title || 'brak danych') + '. Wyniki CEFR: ' + JSON.stringify($json.cefr_scores || {}) + '. Obserwacje audytora: ' + ($json.observations || 'brak') + '. Mocne strony: ' + JSON.stringify($json.strengths || []) + '. Luki: ' + JSON.stringify($json.gaps || []) + '. Potrzeby zgloszone przez managera: ' + ($json.manager_needs || 'brak') + '. Sytuacje komunikacyjne: ' + JSON.stringify($json.communication_situations || []) + '. Hipoteza z wczesniejszej ekstrakcji AI: ' + ($json.hypothesis_recommendation || 'brak') + '.' } ] }) }}

parameters.query:
WITH ai AS (
  SELECT $2::jsonb AS draft
), rec AS (
  INSERT INTO appdata.recommendations (opportunity_id, audit_id, type, headline, situation_description, rationale, priority)
  VALUES (
    $1::bigint,
    $3::bigint,
    COALESCE($4::appdata.rec_type, 'mixed'),
    (SELECT draft ->> 'headline' FROM ai),
    (SELECT draft ->> 'situation_description' FROM ai),
    (SELECT draft ->> 'rationale' FROM ai),
    1
  )
  RETURNING id
), goals AS (
  INSERT INTO appdata.recommendation_goals (recommendation_id, position, title, body, stage_label)
  SELECT (SELECT id FROM rec), t.ord, t.elem ->> 'title', t.elem ->> 'body', t.elem ->> 'stage_label'
  FROM jsonb_array_elements(coalesce((SELECT draft -> 'goals' FROM ai), '[]'::jsonb)) WITH ORDINALITY AS t(elem, ord)
  RETURNING id
), methodologist AS (
  SELECT id FROM appdata.users WHERE role = 'methodologist' AND active ORDER BY id LIMIT 1
), owner AS (
  SELECT c.owner_user_id FROM appdata.opportunities o JOIN appdata.clients c ON c.id = o.client_id WHERE o.id = $1::bigint
), task AS (
  INSERT INTO appdata.tasks (entity_type, entity_id, assignee_user_id, title, stage_ref)
  VALUES ('opportunity', $1::bigint, COALESCE((SELECT id FROM methodologist), (SELECT owner_user_id FROM owner)), 'Zatwierdź rekomendację — opportunity #' || $1::bigint, 'demo')
  RETURNING id
)
SELECT (SELECT id FROM rec) AS recommendation_id, (SELECT count(*) FROM goals) AS goals_count, (SELECT id FROM task) AS task_id;

options.queryReplacement: ={{ [ $node["Postgres: Pobierz kontekst audytu"].json.opportunity_id, JSON.stringify(JSON.parse($json.choices[0].message.content)), $node["Postgres: Pobierz kontekst audytu"].json.audit_id, $node["Postgres: Pobierz kontekst audytu"].json.hypothesis_recommendation || null ] }}
={{ [ $node["Postgres: Pobierz kontekst audytu"].json.opportunity_id, $node["Postgres: Pobierz kontekst audytu"].json.audit_id ] }}
